potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall restart and begin running from a shut down condition.
The system shall enter configuration mode when changes or power-saving settings are required.
The system shall return to running state after configuration is completed.
The system shall collect data when triggered by the clock while running.
The system shall prepare and send out a weather summary upon request.
The system shall return to running state after performing an activity (data collection, summary preparation, or status checking).
The system shall move into a controlled mode through remote control.
The system shall return to shut down condition if a shutdown command is given while running.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, it can either be restarted and begin running, or it can go into a configuration mode when changes or power-saving settings are needed.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall enter configuration mode from a shut down condition when changes or power-saving settings are required.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the configuration is finished, it returns to running.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall return to running state after configuration is completed.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall move into a controlled mode through remote control.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of 'controlled mode' in the source text, only that it can be moved into a 'remote control' state.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall collect data when triggered by the clock while running.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall return to running state after performing an activity (data collection, summary preparation, or status checking).
duplicates.reason: Both requirements are essentially stating that the system returns to a running state after an activity.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall prepare and send out a weather summary upon request.
ambiguities.reason: It is not clear if 'sending' the information means it should be sent immediately or stored for later transmission.
